events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer raw JSON. Need analyze scenario. The user wants hazard check for form build & bracing industrial site. Scenario: Pre-task photos show exposure area set up with planned guards, access control, crew protection in place. Daily briefing form signed, no active exposure visible. Reference ACI 347. We must evaluate field condition. Stage in-progress actively. No active exposure visible, controls in place, briefing signed. Likely pass, low risk. Need fill required fields. component_conditions none flagged, use empty list. percent_complete estimate maybe 30? value 0. confidence maybe 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty, findings empty, actions empty or acknowledge maintain controls. rationale brief. references ACI 347. Ensure decision pass if safe compliant.
